name: Llama Model Family
description: Planning profile for open-weight Llama-style deployments where safety behavior depends strongly on fine-tuning, system prompts, and application controls.

risk_sensitivities.rationale: Self-hosted or modified deployments may vary widely in safety tuning and refusal quality.
Prompt leakage risk depends on prompt composition and output filtering controls.

evaluation_notes: Record model variant, fine-tuning, system prompt, and guardrail layers when known.
Do not assume provider-managed safety controls are present in local deployments.
